body.title: Scrub SQLite language from glossary.md; point at palace
body.result: Shipped in 4e5e9099. LTM/word-graph/db_proxy/Live-DB lines now reflect Postgres reality instead of SQLite legacy. Added Palace section with psql one-liner + 'palace wins on conflict' note.
body.description:
Pass-2 Area 7 Finding 11-glossary-drift (SHIP). lab/docs/glossary.md still says LTM is SQLite, word graph is SQLite, db_proxy wraps SQLite, and live DB is wild-0001.db — SQLite has been dead for weeks; real live DB is Postgres Igor-wild-0001. Four drift sites. Fix in-place; add a palace link and 'palace wins on conflict' note.

**Affected files:** lab/docs/glossary.md.
**Design rules:** test-plan-or-why-not (no tests because: docstring-only).
**Scope boundary:** IN — scrub SQLite references + palace pointer. OUT — relocating glossary to palace (separate T-glossary-into-palace).
**Test plan:** no tests — doc edit. Verify grep -i sqlite returns only intentional historical mentions if any.
